description: AI Guardrails — gateway detects and handles PII/sensitive data in tool call payloads. Expects blocking (4xx) or redaction, never crashes (500).

tasks.name: SSN in tool arguments

arguments.query: My SSN is 123-45-6789 and my email is test@example.com

tasks.notes: SSN + email PII — gateway should block or redact, never crash.

tasks.name: Credit card number in payload
tasks.notes: Credit card PII pattern — tests PAN detection in guardrails.

tasks.name: Phone number and address

arguments.query: Contact John Doe at +33 6 12 34 56 78, lives at 42 Rue de Rivoli, Paris

tasks.notes: European phone number + address — tests non-US PII patterns.

tasks.name: Clean payload (no PII)

arguments.query: What is the current weather in Paris?

tasks.notes: No PII — guardrails should pass through without blocking.

tasks.name: Mixed PII in nested arguments
tasks.notes: Nested object with French national ID (NIR) + email — tests deep PII scanning.
